title: T-017 — quality_specifications + quality_spec_parameters schema + RLS (09-b-01)
prompt:
# T-017 — quality_specifications + quality_spec_parameters schema

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_specifications, §6.3 quality_spec_parameters, §9.1 RLS, §11.3 V-QA-SPEC
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the quality_specifications versioned table + quality_spec_parameters child table with CHECK (min<=target<=max), UNIQUE(org_id,product_id,spec_code,version), RLS, Drizzle schemas.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0110_quality_specifications.sql` per §6.3 verbatim DDL (status CHECK enum, version INT, applies_to CHECK enum, allergen_profile JSONB, approval_signature_hash, superseded_by self-FK, UNIQUE constraint).
2. quality_spec_parameters child with CHECK (min_value <= max_value when both present) and parameter_type CHECK enum (visual/measurement/attribute/microbiological/chemical/sensory/equipment).
3. RLS tenant_isolation on both tables.
4. Drizzle ORM schema files exporting types.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0110_quality_specifications.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualitySpecifications.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualitySpecParameters.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-specifications-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0110 applied, when \d quality_specifications runs, then all §6.3 columns exist with status CHECK enum and UNIQUE(org_id,product_id,spec_code,version) constraint, RLS enabled
2. Given a parameter insert with min_value=10 and max_value=5, then it fails CHECK (min<=max) constraint
3. Given two specs with same (org_id, product_id, spec_code, version), then the second insert fails UNIQUE violation

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_specifications + quality_spec_parameters tables with CHECK constraints, UNIQUE, RLS, Drizzle schemas.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0110 emits both tables per §6.3 verbatim. quality_specifications: status CHECK enum draft/under_review/active/expired/superseded, applies_to CHECK enum, allergen_profile JSONB, UNIQUE(org_id,product_id,spec_code,version). quality_spec_parameters: parameter_type CHECK enum (7 values), min<=max CHECK, sort_order. Both tables RLS-enabled with tenant_isolation. Drizzle types mirror columns.
out_of_scope: Do not seed spec data (out-of-scope; tenant-driven)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0110 applied, when \d quality_specifications runs, then all §6.3 columns exist with status CHECK enum and UNIQUE(org_id,product_id,spec_code,version) constraint and RLS enabled
Given a parameter insert with min_value=10 and max_value=5, then it fails the CHECK (min<=max) constraint
Given two specs with same (org_id, product_id, spec_code, version), then the second insert fails the UNIQUE constraint
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/quality-specifications-schema.test.ts asserting columns, RLS, CHECK and UNIQUE constraints before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-specifications-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not omit allergen_profile JSONB (snapshot at approval per §6.3)
Do not change CHECK enums (downstream rules depend on them)
